description: Integrated real-time vehicle tracking, charging status updates, and user profiles using RESTful APIs and Firebase, shipping to 10,000+ users on iOS and Android.
Implemented Zustand and React Query for state management, optimizing API caching and improving response times by 30%.
Built custom reusable UI components, set up Jest unit tests, and established CI/CD pipelines to enhance application stability.
Optimised React Native components and reduced JS bundle size by ~30% through code splitting and lazy loading, improving app load performance.
Created custom hooks for reusable business logic, reducing code duplication across the codebase.
Integrated third-party APIs and libraries to extend app functionality and drive user engagement.
Developed event-driven architecture with efficient JavaScript event handling.
Coordinated deployments, feature updates, and hotfixes across release cycles.
Led development of cross-platform mobile and web apps across multiple client domains including fresh food retail and college discovery.
Developed Invafresh — a demand forecasting app for fresh food retail; improved process management accuracy by 25%, reducing inventory waste.
Built HBCU Spark, a college search web app that increased user engagement by 40% through a clean filtering UX.
Analysed technical requirements, designed scalable architectures, and wrote test plans for all delivered projects.
